frameworks.name: 健康促進與協作流程
frameworks.desc: C01 Health and Wellness Promotion 與 C02 Integrative Design 要提供 WELL Feature Guide、health-oriented mission，並促進 collaborative planning process。

frameworks.name: 緊急準備與韌性資源
frameworks.desc: C03 Emergency Preparedness 與 C14 Emergency Resources 要求 risk assessment、emergency management plan、first aid kits、AED 與相關訓練資源。

frameworks.name: 使用者調查與回饋
frameworks.desc: C04 Occupant Survey 與 C05 Enhanced Occupant Survey 用第三方或 custom survey 評估 building users 的 experience、self-reported health and well-being。

frameworks.name: 包容、家庭與公共健康政策
frameworks.desc: C06 Health Services and Benefits、C08 New Parent Support、C09 New Mother Support、C10 Family Support、C12 Diversity and Inclusion 與 C13 Accessibility and Universal Design 將 health benefits、family policies、equity 與 universal design 納入社區健康。

questions.stem: Acme Corp is building a new office in Atlanta, GA. In order to earn a point for Feature C11: Civic Engagement, they must include an indoor or outdoor space to be used by the community. Which space type is best suitable for this credit?

options.text: A board room that is 2,000 sq. ft..
A small meeting room that can accommodate 5 adults.
An outdoor classroom/quad with enough tables to accommodate 10-20 adults.
A presentation hall that is available every other week.

questions.stem: A project wishes to submit a program to be considered for inclusion with regard to Feature C12: Diversity and Inclusion. All of the following with the exception of _____ must be included.

options.text: Pay equity and transparency (e.g., compensation scale equity, living wage, gender and ethnic pay equity).
Protocol that eliminates C-suite and creates a company co-op.
Non-discrimination, including discrimination and harassment reporting procedures.

questions.stem: A project in San Francisco, California wants to maximize their diversity and inclusion points via a custom program. To receive the maximum three points for this effort, how many requirements from this list must they implement?  Gender (assigned, identity and/or expression).  Sexual orientation.  Race/Ethnicity.  Age.  Socioeconomic background.  Level of ability.  Other metric(s) as identified by the project or organization.

XYZ Corp has offices across the United States. They ask a long-time employee from their Atlanta office to relocate to Los Angeles to help establish their new outfit. They plan to pay for the employee's relocation and provided a $ 1,000.00 increase in pay. The employee has family on the West Coast they will live with upon arriving and expressed how excited they are for this new adventure. Is XYZ Corp in compliance with the standards set forth in Feature C12: Diversity and Inclusion?

options.text: Yes, because XYZ covered the costs of the move and the employee is satisfied.
No, because XYZ needs to provide a living wage, determined by the local cost of living.
Yes, because the employee will not incur the cost of living increase, as a result of living with family.
No, because XYZ corp needs to provide a merit raise, promotional raise, and a signing bonus for the new role.

questions.stem: A new corporate headquarters for Salesforce is being built in Austin, TX. The design team wanted the office to fit into the Austin culture and has created every part of the office to be unique, creative, and very bright and bold. The initial employee feedback has been overwhelmingly positive, however, some employees find the loud color schemes to be distracting and overload their senses. Which strategy in Feature C13: Accessibility and Universal Design should Salesforce have consulted before this design language was chosen?

John started working for LMN Corp in California. John suffers from heart complications, and sometimes has issues where he requires immediate medical attention. John usually takes public transit as his main form of transport, but as a result of wildfires, there have been public transportation shutdowns. John has relied on Uber and Lyft as a main transit option. How much should John be reimbursed by LMN Corp for his new expenditures on his transit costs?
questions.source_explanation: Part 1: Promote Emergency Resources of Feature C14: Emergency Resources.

questions.stem: The intent of Feature C18 β: Support for Victims of Domestic Violence is to increase availability and access to support services, resources, and care for victims of domestic abuse. As part of the domestic violence policy, how must paid time off be available to an employee who is a victim of domestic violence?

options.text: At least 10 days and is distinct from other paid time off.

questions.stem: Which of the following does NOT need to be included in Opioid Response training?

options.text: General information about opioid use and naloxone.
Recognizing the signs of an overdose and immediate steps to take.
How to safely administer naloxone and steps to take following administration.
Calling 911 and informing HR your co-worker may be using banned substances.

questions.source_explanation:
Part 2:  Provide Opioid Response Kit and Training of Feature C14: Emergency 
Resources.

questions.stem: Green Co. has created a Business Continuity Plan in place in the event there were ever a natural disaster or other events that impacted business. At a minimum, how often does the business continuity team need to meet to revise and discuss the plan that is currently in place for Green Co.?
questions.source_explanation:
Part 1: Promote Business Continuity of Feature C15 β: Emergency Resilience and 
Recovery.

questions.stem: Business continuity planning is critical to help manage business disruption during emergencies. Cola Corp. is constructing an office in Tempe, AZ. Part 1: Promote Buiness Continuity of Feature C15 β: Emergency Resilience and Recovery details that a business continuity plan address at minimum:

options.text: Determines critical business functions, processes, supporting resources and dependencies (e.g., email, internet connectivity, third-party suppliers or service providers, interdependent departments).
Conducts a remote work readiness assessment.

questions.stem: Part 2: Provide Opioid Response Kit and Training of Feature C14: Emergency Resources details requirements for opioid response kits. What must all emergency preparedness or first aid kits include:

Feature C14: Emergency Resources provides resources, personnel and training to help organizations respond to diverse emergency situations. In Part 1: Promote Emergency Resources, are project owners required to make tenants participate in practice drills for emergency preparedness and response?

options.text: No, practice drills and emergency preparedness are the responsibility of the HR Department for each tenant.
Project owners must mandate all tenants to take place and participate.
Project owners must provide opportunities for all tenants to participate in drills and emergency, but do not have to mandate tenant participation.
All staff and tenants must be involved in every drill.

questions.stem: Feature C15 β: Emergency Resilience and Recovery seeks assist organizations to maintain business function, during and after emergencies. In the case of extended remote work, office closures, or other extreme events requiring a delayed and/or staggered return to the office, how long do projects have to implement the post-occupancy survey?

options.text: Within 1 month after returning to the workplace.
Within 3 months after returning to the workplace.
Within 6 months after returning to the workplace.
Within 1 year after returning to the workplace.

questions.stem: How many lactation rooms are needed for a project to comply with Feature C09: New Mother Support?

options.text: A lactation room on every floor.
There are no specific requirements, this is left up to the project team to determine how to best establish the appropriate quantity base on their project's unique circumstances.

questions.stem: A new residential tower is being constructed in Minneapolis. For the project to receive the maximum number of points (2) in Feature C16 β: Housing Equity, how many of the units need to be allocated for tenants whose incomes are at or below an income limit relative to local median household income?

Part 1: Allocate Affordable Units of Feature C16 β: Housing Equity requires projects to assign a percentage of units is allocated for tenant show incomes are at or below an income limit. Total annual housing costs (defined as rent and utilities) paid by affordable unit tenants must be less than what percent of the income limit selected in the requirement?

Affordable housing is a problem globally with families forced to spend a significant share of their income in housing cots making it hard for them to cover basic needs. In projects with 10 or more affordable housing units, at least ___ of allocated units must have two or more bedrooms and at least ___ of allocated units must have three or more bedrooms.
questions.source_explanation: Part 1: Allocate Affordable Units of Feature C16 β: Housing Equity.

questions.stem: Part 1: Disclose Labor Practices of Feature C17 β: Responsible Labor Practices requires a comprehensive mapping of the project or organization’s structure, operations, and supply chains is conducted annually for Tier 1 suppliers in the following sectors with the exception of:

The intent of Feature C17 β: Responsible Labor Practices is to promote organizational commitment to responsible labor practices in order to address modern slavery in the supply chain and support human rights. The Global Slavery Index estimates that in 2016 there were over 40 million victims of modern slavery worldwide. How many people are forced labor globally.
questions.source_explanation: Read overview for Feature C17 β: Responsible Labor Practices.

questions.stem: Feature C10: Family Support requires employers to provide this option to eligible employees:

options.text: Use paid sick time or personal days for the care of a spouse, domestic partner, child, dependent, parent, parent-in- law, grandparent, grandchild or sibling.
Use unpaid days for the care of a spouse, domestic partner, child, dependent, parent, parent-in- law, grandparent, grandchild or sibling.
Use paid sick time or personal days for the care of a spouse or child only.
Use paid sick time or personal days for the care of anyone.

questions.stem: This WELL feature requires paid parental leave for primary and non-primary caregivers and supportive resources for parents returning to work.

options.text: Feature C06: Health Services and Benefits

questions.stem: Feature C09: New Mother support requires that a project must provide at least one dedicated lactation room for employees that:

options.text: Is at least 7 ft x 7 ft
Has at least four electrical outlets

questions.stem: This WELL feature requires projects to provide access to essential and on-demand health services, paid sick leave, and seasonal influenza (flu) immunizations.

options.text: Feature C07: Enhanced Health and Wellness Promotion
Feature C01: Health and Wellness Promotion
Feature C13: Accessibility and Universal Design
Feature C06: Health Services and Benefits

questions.stem: Feature C02: Integrative Design is a WELL feature that requires project teams to facilitate an inclusive and collaborative planning and orientation process and to establish __________.

This WELL feature requires projects to go above and beyond accessibility laws and/or codes by integrating universal design principles to accommodate diverse needs and create a fully inclusive environment.

options.text: Feature C13: Accessibility and Universal Design
